channel.title: Effortlessly Scale With Your Business on BurningXFlame
channel.description: Recent content in Effortlessly Scale With Your Business on BurningXFlame

item.title: Intro
item.description: XTS - Secure and Adaptive Cross-Region Transmission for Cloud XTS is a Cloud-Native Cross-Region Transmission Service which improves the security of Cross-Region Transmission,

item.title: Intro
item.description: GX - Go eXtended lib GX is a Go eXtended lib to improve productivity, performance, reliability and security of your products at ease.

item.title: Intro
item.description: DCS - Horizontally-Scalable Cron for Cloud DCS is a Truly-Distributed, Load-Balanced and Horizontally-Scalable Job Scheduling System for Cloud-Native environments.

item.title: Use
item.description: Define a Region CR apiVersion: ext.burningxflame.github.com/v1 kind: Region metadata: namespace: <ns> name: <name> spec: # the internal port of XTS for the destination region internalPort: <port> # the external (i.

item.title: Pricing
item.description: Pricing and Licensing Base Pro Enterprise License Open Source License ↗ Commercial Developer License Commercial Organization License Use GX to Build Open Source Projects Commercial Products Commercial Products Number of Licensed Developers - 1 Unlimited Support - Email Email Buy ↗ Buy ↗ With the purchase of a commercial license:

item.title: Pricing
item.description: Features, Pricing and Licensing Category Feature Pro Enterprise Audience Small Business Medium to Large Companies API CR ✅ ✅ API RESTful ✅ ✅ Function Cron Job ✅ ✅ Function Periodic Job ✅ ✅ Function HTTP Callback ✅ ✅ Function HTTP Callback with Header and/or Body ✅ ✅ Function TCP Callback ✅ ✅ Function Time Zone ✅ ✅ Function Time Zone Change - ✅ Function Job History - ✅ Function Limit Schedule Times - ✅ Scalability Vertical Scaling ✅ ✅ Scalability Horizontal Scaling - ✅ Reliability Architecture Active-Standby Truly-Distributed, Load-Balancing Reliability Callback with Retry - ✅ Reliability Callback with Timeout - ✅ Reliability Zero Downtime During Scaling Out/In - ✅ Reliability Zero Downtime During Upgrade - ✅ Reliability Zero Downtime on Time Zone Changes - ✅ Reliability Zero Downtime on Temporary Errors - ✅ Reliability Zero Downtime on Process Crash - ✅ Logging High-Performant Logging and Log Rotation ✅ ✅ Deployment Zero Dependency ✅ ✅ Deployment Docker Image and Helm Chart ✅ ✅ Upgrade Seamlessly Upgrade to a New Version ✅ ✅ Upgrade Seamlessly Upgrade from Pro - ✅ Support Email Email License Commercial Commercial Learn More → Learn More → Buy ↗ Buy ↗ With the purchase of a commercial license:

item.title: Pricing
item.description: Feature List Category Feature Function Cross-Region Transmission Function Multiple Regions Security Secure Tunnels Security Minimize Attack Surface Security Reject Connections From the Public Internet Security Protect Services From Being Exposed to the Public Internet Security Defend Against DDoS Attacks Security Defend Against Slow Attacks Security Close Idle Connections Scalability Vertical Scaling Scalability Horizontal Scaling Reliability Truly-Distributed Reliability Load-Balancing Reliability Established Connections Remain Intact on Config Changes Reliability Zero Downtime During Scaling Out/In Reliability Zero Downtime During Upgrade Reliability Zero Downtime on Temporary Errors Reliability Zero Downtime on Process Crash Logging High-Performant Logging and Log Rotation Deployment Docker Image and Helm Chart Upgrade Seamlessly Upgrade to a New Version Add-On List Add-On Feature ATC Adaptive Hierarchical Transmission Control Pricing and Licensing XTS XTS Add-On License Commercial License Commercial Add-On License Features Learn More → Learn More → Support Email Email Buy ↗ Buy ↗ With the purchase of a commercial license:

item.title: Features
item.description: Function Cross-Region Transmission XTS establishes secure tunnels between regions, and enables cross-region transmission. Multiple Regions XTS supports multiple regions. You may define as many regions as you like.

item.title: Pro
item.description: Complete List of All Features Buy Features of DCS Pro Function Define a Job apiVersion: ext.burningxflame.github.com/v1 kind: CronJob metadata: namespace: <ns> name: <name> spec: expr: .

item.title: Add-Ons
item.description: Add-On Feature ATC Adaptive Hierarchical Transmission Control ATC - Adaptive Hierarchical Transmission Control XTS can adapt to real-time traffic, and ensure priority guarantee, maximum bandwidth utilization, and fairness at the same time.
